reason: Pre-dev checklist + guideline index for backend layer
Milestone order, guardrails, parity verification rules
SQLite conventions, rusqlite patterns (storage layer used by API)
TianJiError enum including Storage variant; error communication patterns
Test contract fixture verification, dependency policy
Daemon runtime contract: socket control plane, job lifecycle, operator commands
Read-first HTTP API contract: routes, envelopes, frozen vocabulary
Web UI contract: optional surface, startup, reverse proxy, queue-run
Contract relationships: daemon hosts API, webui consumes API, TUI independent
Score field names used in API responses and storage queries
